options.formLabel: Basic outline plans (for quotes and planning application)

next.formLabel: What type of project are you planning?

next.placeholder: Include any details you think the tradesperson should know (approx. extension dimensions, timeframe, etc.)

next.helpText: More tradespeople express interest in jobs that have a descriptive name.
